zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Bigod於大約1083年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素時，她的父親Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk36歲，母親Adelise de Tosny21歲。她於1099年與William d'Aubigny在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Bigod was born about 1083, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, her father, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, was 36 and her mother, Adelise de Tosny, was 21. She married William d'Aubigny in 1099, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Bigod est née environ 1083, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Tosny, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William d'Aubigny en 1099, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Bigod um 1083 in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk 36 und ihre Mutter Adelise de Tosny 21. Sie hat 1099 in Norfolk, England William d'Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England begraben.

Lei sposato William d'Aubigny nel 1099, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Maud Bigodが約1083年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた時，父Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolkは36歳，母Adelise de Tosnyは21歳であった。1099年にイギリスノーフォルクでWilliam d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムウイモンドハム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Bigod(이)가 대략 1083년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelise de Tosny(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1099년 영국 노르폴크에서 William d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함 윈이몽함 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Bigod nasceu aproximadamente 1083, em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Tosny, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William d'Aubigny em 1099, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Bigod родилась около 1083 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Tosny, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William d'Aubigny в 1099 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности вимондхам эбби, вимондхам, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con William d'Aubigny en 1099, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
